articles.headline: Cytokinetics heart drug scores in closely watched trial
articles.summary: Cytokinetics' Myqorzo succeeded in Phase 3 trials for non-obstructive hypertrophic cardiomyopathy, hitting dual primary endpoints with statistically significant improvements in peak oxygen consumption and heart health scores. This differentiates it from Bristol Myers Squibb's Camzyos, which failed in the same indication last year, potentially opening access to the one-third of HCM patients with non-obstructive disease. The drug showed manageable safety profile though 27 patients experienced drops in ejection fraction versus one on placebo.
articles.why_it_matters: Success in both obstructive and non-obstructive HCM could expand Cytokinetics' addressable market to over $5 billion annually while establishing competitive advantage over Bristol Myers' $1B+ Camzyos franchise.

articles.headline: Amazon 1Q'26: Rosy Near-term but 'Cloudy' Long-term
articles.summary: Amazon's AWS accelerated to 28% growth in Q1'26 (highest in 15 quarters) driving strong results, while retail business showed remarkable resilience with 15% unit growth despite average product prices declining year-over-year. However, Amazon's advertising growth has plateaued at 22% for four consecutive quarters while Google advertising has been accelerating, suggesting shifting competitive dynamics.
articles.why_it_matters: AWS growth acceleration is critical for Big Tech momentum and provides insights into AI infrastructure investment sustainability, while the advertising competitive dynamics between Amazon/Google/Meta signal important shifts in digital ad market share.
